subject: New Request: Backend Engineer – Fintech
body:
Hi there,

I wanted to share an exciting opportunity that just came in from Kredify, a company in the fintech space.

They are scaling their engineering team and are looking for a Backend Engineer to join on a contract basis.

What they're looking for:

  • Java
  • AWS
  • Docker

Practical details:

  • Start: 2025-10-22
  • Duration: 12 months
  • Location: Stockholm (hybrid)
  • Rate: up to 850 SEK/h

If this sounds like a fit, or you know someone who might be – reach out!

Best regards,
Oscar Lindgren
Senior Consultant Manager
Staffbridge Nordic
Tel: +46 73 233 45 67
